processing: Processing. Please wait for the current operation to finish.
missing_fields: Fill in all required fields before adding a file.
value_not_exists_add_question: Value '{value}' does not exist in the extras list. Add it?
loc_download_failed: Localization files unavailable. Check repository access.
list_data_save_failed:
Failed to save data to list.xlsx:
{error}
operation_errors: Operation finished with errors. Check logs and backup folder: {backup}
ftp_send_failed:
Local data saved but uploading files to FTP failed.
Reason: {reason}
ftp_skipped_no_ean: Local data saved but images were not uploaded to FTP due to missing valid EAN-13 code.
sql_update_failed:
Local data and FTP updated, but database update failed.
Reason: {reason}
sql_presence_table_parse_failed: Unable to read table name from SQL update template. SQL presence check skipped.
enter_ean_to_load: Enter EAN code to load data.
fill_required_before_open: Fill in all required fields (name, type, model, color 1) before opening the folder.
run_as_admin: Run with administrator privileges to edit these settings.
app_settings_hint: Changing the base directory requires restarting the application.
color_field_labels_hint: Changes only the field names in the form. It does not change Excel or SQL column names.
app_settings_restart: The base directory change will take effect after restarting the application.
format_info_placeholder: Select a format to see details. Conversion saves the image in the new format.
format_info_generic: No description for this format. Size depends on image content.
format_info_jpeg: JPEG/JPG: lossy format, usually the smallest size; no transparency.
format_info_png: PNG: lossless, supports transparency; usually larger size.
format_info_webp: WEBP: can be lossy or lossless; usually smaller than PNG/JPEG.
format_info_gif: GIF: limited palette, good for simple graphics; smaller than PNG.
format_info_tiff: TIFF: often lossless, large size; common for scans.
fill_required_before_submit: Fill in all required fields marked * before submitting.
ean_missing_prompt: No EAN provided. Enter a 13-digit EAN code or leave blank to use 'BRAK-EAN':
name_tooltip: Full furniture name without colors, type, or model, e.g., 'Maggiore', 'LUNA', 'SLANT'.
type_tooltip: Furniture type, e.g., 'CHEST', 'TV STAND', 'TABLE' (you can add length, e.g., 'TV STAND 100', 'WARDROBE 80').
extra_tooltip: Additional information, e.g., LED, RGB (leave empty if none).
ean_tooltip: 13-digit product EAN code. If not provided, 'BRAK-EAN' will be used.
excel_add_locked: Attempt to add '{value}' to list {list}, Excel file locked {reason}.
excel_add_save_failed: Failed to save Excel file (adding {value} to {list}): {error}
excel_remove_locked: Attempt to remove '{value}' from list {list}, Excel file locked {reason}.
excel_remove_save_failed: Failed to save Excel file (removing {value} from {list}): {error}
excel_entry_save_locked: Attempt to save entry EAN {ean}, Excel file locked {reason}.
excel_entry_save_failed: Failed to save entry EAN {ean} to Excel: {error}
remove_file_before_overwrite_failed: Failed to remove file {file} before overwriting: {error}
ftp_upload_skipped_settings: Skipped sending files to FTP (disabled in settings).
ftp_file_missing_no_delete: File {file} does not exist on FTP (no need to delete)
ftp_delete_error: Failed to delete file {file} on FTP: {error}
ftp_summary: FTP: uploaded {uploaded} files, deleted {deleted}, time {time} ms, status: {status}
sql_summary: SQL: queries {queries}, rows changed ~{rows}, time {time} ms
entry_updated_log: Updated entry: EAN={ean}, NAME={name}, TYPE={type}, MODEL={model}, COLOR1={color1}, COLOR2={color2}, COLOR3={color3}, EXTRAS={extras}
entry_added_log: Added new entry: EAN={ean}, NAME={name}, TYPE={type}, MODEL={model}, COLOR1={color1}, COLOR2={color2}, COLOR3={color3}, EXTRAS={extras}
excel_file_open: Cannot save list. Excel file is open {reason}. Close the file and try again.
excel_data_file_open: Cannot save data. Excel file is open {reason}. Close the file and try again.
error_test_hint: Selected tests intentionally raise an exception to verify error handling.
code_check_no_sources: No source files found to check.
code_check_ok: Checked {count} files. No syntax errors found.
code_check_error_summary: Found {errors} syntax errors in {count} files. Details in the log.
code_check_hint: Checks syntax of .py/.pyw files; does not execute the full app logic.
ui_check_hint: Checks basic UI elements (buttons, windows, events).
ui_check_ok: UI tests completed. No issues found.
ui_check_detail_list_editor: List editor window failed to open.
name_not_in_list_add_question: Name '{value}' does not exist in the list. Add it?
type_not_in_list_add_question: Type '{value}' does not exist in the list. Add it?
model_not_in_list_add_question: Model '{value}' does not exist in the list. Add it?
color_not_in_list_single_question: Color '{value}' does not exist in the list. Add a new entry?
color_not_in_list_plural_question: Colors '{values}' do not exist in the list. Add new entries?
slot_sql_copy_tooltip: Click to copy the SQL image URL to the clipboard.
base_dir_prompt_required: Working directory not selected. The application will close.
base_dir_invalid_selection: Unable to access the selected directory. Choose another location.
base_dir_prompt_reason: The "local_settings.json" file does not contain a base directory or the specified path is unavailable. Select a folder where data should be saved and read.
ftp_delete_failed_list: Failed to delete some files on FTP: {files}
sql_presence_query_error: SQL presence query failed for column {column}: {error}
reload_entries_failed: Failed to reload entries after saving: {error}
sql_columns_parse_failed_msg: Unable to read the table name from the SQL query.
sql_columns_query_unavailable: The query preview will appear after entering a valid UPDATE statement.
sql_mapping_hint: Drag a column onto a field or type the name manually.
field_id_invalid: Field ID must be a number greater than 0.
field_id_duplicate: ID '{prefix}' is already used by field '{label}'.
field_translate_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch translations. Check your internet connection.
field_translate_missing_api_key: Missing translation API key. Add it in settings.
slot_defs_rebuild_prompt: Changing photo fields will clear current data in the slots. Continue?
sql_column_unassigned: No SQL column assigned for field {prefix} ({label}).
slot_def_fallback: Invalid field definitions detected. Defaults restored.
sql_map_extra_entry: SQL mapping contained unknown field {prefix} and was ignored.
sql_columns_parse_failed: Unable to read the table name from the SQL query.
slot_defs_apply_restart: Photo field changes will be visible after restart.
